debug_info.goal:
m n : ℕ
⊢ m.factorial * n.factorial * (m + n).factorial ∣ (2 * m).factorial * (2 * n).factorial

verification_message: All 1 attempts failed (1 strategies x 1 attempts each)
proof_attempts:
have hm : m ! * m ! ∣ (2 * m)! := by
    simpa [mul_comm, mul_left_comm, mul_assoc, two_mul] using
      (Nat.mul_self_factorial_dvd_factorial_add_factorial m m)
  have hn : n ! * n ! ∣ (2 * n)! := by
    simpa [mul_comm, mul_left_comm, mul_assoc, two_mul] using
      (Nat.mul_self_factorial_dvd_factorial_add_factorial n n)
  have hmn : m ! * n ! ∣ (m + n)! := by
    simpa [mul_comm, mul_left_comm, mul_assoc] using
      (Nat.mul_factorial_dvd_factorial_add m n)
  have hmn' : m ! * n ! * (m + n)! ∣ (m ! * m !) * (n ! * n !) := by
    have : (m ! * n ! * (m + n)!) ∣ (m ! * n ! * (m ! * n !)) := by
      simpa [mul_assoc, mul_left_comm, mul_comm] using Nat.mul_dvd_mul_left (m ! * n !) hmn
    exact this.trans <| by
      simpa [mul_assoc, mul_left_comm, mul_comm] using
        (Nat.mul_dvd_mul_right (m + n)! (Nat.mul_dvd_mul_left (m ! * n !) (Nat.dvd_refl (m ! * n !)))
          )
  have hprod : (m ! * m !) * (n ! * n !) ∣ (2 * m)! * (2 * n)! := by
    exact Nat.mul_dvd_mul hm hn
  exact (hmn'.trans hprod).trans (by
    simpa [mul_assoc, mul_left_comm, mul_comm] using Nat.dvd_rfl)
